items.title: Trade, energy, discussions on global conflicts to top agenda for Modi’s Nordic visit
items.summary: First Indian Prime Minister’s bilateral visit in 43 years, first Nordic summit since 2022 to kick off this week in Oslo.

items.title: Italy’s leaders visit victims of Modena car-ramming, stabbing attacks
items.summary: The attacks carried out by 31-year-old Salim El Khoudri appear related 'to a situation of psychiatric distress'.
